ComingSoon.tagline: The premium social club resort of South Samui.
ComingSoon.description: Tennis, the island's home of pickleball, a premium gym, a healthy restaurant, a kids club and a pool — all in one place in the heart of Lamai. We're putting the finishing touches in place. Reach out and we'll let you know the moment we open.
ComingSoon.whatsappPrefill: Hi Shi Shi Samui! I'd love to know more about the club and your opening.

hero.title: The premium social club <accent>resort</accent> of South Samui
hero.subtitle: Sport, wellness and good company in one place. Tennis, the island's home of pickleball, a premium gym, a healthy restaurant, kids club and pool. Book your session online in under a minute.

tiles.title: One club, six ways to enjoy the island
tiles.subtitle: Pick an activity to discover the space, the prices and book your session in a tap.
tiles.intro: Tennis, pickleball, fitness, a healthy restaurant, kids club and pool: six poles brought together in one place to live, in the south of Koh Samui.

values.sportText: Tennis, pickleball and a premium gym to play, train and progress on quality facilities.
values.wellnessText: Healthy food, pool time and a calm island setting to recover and feel your best.
values.socialText: A real club spirit where expats, nomads and travellers meet, play and connect.

story.title: Two young French founders, one island ambition
story.p1: Shi Shi was born from a simple idea: bring the energy of a premium social club to the south of Koh Samui. Two young French entrepreneurs took over an existing Thai business and are turning it into the reference for sport and lifestyle in Lamai.
story.p2: Built around its three values of sport, wellness and social, Shi Shi is where the local community comes to play pickleball, train, eat well and spend good time together.

cta.title: Ready to play?
cta.subtitle: Check real-time availability, pick your slot and pay securely online. Your court is one minute away.

Booking.title: Book your session in under a minute
Booking.subtitle: Choose an activity to check availability and reserve your spot. Secure payment and instant confirmation, no more back-and-forth messages.
Booking.whatToBook: What would you like to book?
Booking.step1Text: Choose your activity, date and time from real-time availability.
Booking.step2Text: Confirm your booking with secure online payment via Stripe.
Booking.step3Text: Receive instant email confirmation and a WhatsApp reminder.
Booking.engineText: The live availability calendar with Stripe payment, email confirmation (Resend) and WhatsApp notifications is being integrated. In the meantime, book directly via WhatsApp.
Booking.scanText: Scan with your phone to message us on WhatsApp.
Booking.formSubtitle: Pick your activity, date and time — pay securely online.
Booking.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or book via WhatsApp.
Booking.requestReceived: Your booking request has been received! We'll confirm with you shortly.
Booking.paidConfirmed: Payment received — your booking is confirmed. A confirmation email is on its way.
Booking.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. Your slot was not booked — feel free to try again.
Booking.noSlots: No slots available for this day. Try another date.
Booking.selectSlot: Please pick an available time slot.
Booking.slotTaken: That slot was just taken. Please pick another time.
Booking.notBookableOnline: This activity isn't booked online — reach us on

Activity.pricingNote: Indicative formulas. Final pricing to be confirmed with the club.

Footer.tagline: A premium social club resort in Lamai, Koh Samui. Sport, wellness and good company. Tennis, pickleball, fitness, healthy food, kids club & pool.

hero.titleLead: The social club resort of South
hero.description: In Lamai, Shi Shi Samui brings sport, wellness and good company together in one place to live. A premium club designed for residents, expats and travellers after an active tropical lifestyle.

story.title: A place to live, not just a club
story.p1: Shi Shi Samui was born from a simple idea: to create, in the south of Koh Samui, a place to move, unwind and connect. Tennis and pickleball, a gym, a healthy restaurant, a kids club and a pool — everything in one spot to enjoy, solo, with friends or as a family.
story.p2: More than a gym or a court, it is a true tropical social club: stay an hour or the whole day, train in the morning and have lunch by the water, let the kids play while the parents relax. An active break, with a laid-back island vibe.

pillars.title: Three pillars, one energy
pillars.sportText: Quality facilities to play and train all year round, from beginner to enthusiast.
pillars.wellnessText: Pool, healthy food and a tropical setting: taking care of yourself while enjoying the moment.
pillars.socialText: A place made for meeting people, family time and the local Lamai community.

complex.title: Everything you need for a perfect day
complex.description: Six hubs steps away from each other, bookable online in under a minute.
